name: OpenClaw Harness
description: Plan-Work-Review loop for coding tasks. Routes requests by complexity, dispatches workers, cross-model review with gap detection.

defaultModel.description: Default model for legacy direct sessions and reviewer fallback

defaultWorkdir.description: Default working directory for new sessions

idleTimeoutMinutes.description: Idle timeout in minutes for multi-turn sessions before auto-kill

maxPersistedSessions.description: Maximum number of completed sessions to keep in memory for resume

permissionMode.description: Default permission mode for Claude Code sessions

agentChannels.description: Map of agent working directories to notification channels

maxAutoResponds.description: Maximum consecutive auto-responds per session before requiring user input

enableLegacyTools.description: Expose legacy direct-session tools like harness_launch / harness_fg / harness_respond only when explicitly enabled.

skipSafetyChecks.description: Skip ALL pre-launch safety guards. Use only for development/testing.

maxReviewLoops.description: Maximum review-fix-rereview cycles before escalation (0 = single review, no fix cycles)

reviewModel.description: Model for Codex-side review. Should differ from the worker/planner model for blind-spot detection.

plannerModel.description: Primary model for internal tier-2 planning (defaults to opus, then falls back to sonnet).

realtimeModel.description: Preferred model selector for the tier 1+ Claude realtime worker (for example: 'sonnet', 'opus', or canonical Anthropic refs).

workerModel.description: Legacy fallback alias for realtimeModel. Still honored for compatibility.

workerEffort.description: Claude Code CLI effort level for worker backends that support it (local-cc uses `claude --effort ...`).

reviewerReasoningEffort.description: Codex CLI reasoning effort for reviewer runs (passed via `codex exec -c model_reasoning_effort=...`).

workerBackend.description: Worker backend lane selector. Phase 1 keeps remote-realtime as the default stable lane.

memoryV3Endpoint.description: Optional Memory V3 search endpoint used to enrich planner context.

routerMaxTokens.description: Legacy compatibility field. Router classification is deterministic.

plannerMaxTokens.description: Legacy compatibility field. Planner output limits are managed by the model runner.

reviewerMaxTokens.description: Legacy compatibility field for reviewer output sizing.
